title: Removed Liquid From Docs Viewer Service Shell
summary: Converted the standalone local Docs Viewer /docs/ service shell from a Liquid-compatible shared fragment to a service-owned HTML template with explicit service placeholders, while leaving Liquid in the public Jekyll include adapter.
effect: The local manage-mode shell is now closer to a JavaScript app mount surface and no longer depends on Liquid-style conditional stripping in the Python service renderer; tests also cover the management theme flag and dark manage-mode colors.
